description: You are a general contractor preparing a complete construction document set for the Contemporary House renovation project. Export the following views as JPEGs: front elevation to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\elevation_front.jpg, side elevation to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\elevation_side.jpg, 2D ground floor plan to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\construction_floor_plan.jpg, and a 3D overview perspective to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\construction_overview.jpg. Save the project to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\construction_docs.dpn.
